title: Audit Log
description: Schema for regulatory reporting and step-by-step provenance tracing.

timestamp.description: Deterministic ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the log event.

trace_id.description: Unique identifier tracking the end-to-end execution path.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the autonomous agent initiating the action.

event_type.description: Category or type of the event (e.g., tool_call, memory_access).

details.description: Detailed payload or arguments specific to the event type.

tool_calls.description: Step-by-step history of tools executed by the agent within this trace.
